root_cause_summary: The customer creation request reused an ingest alias that already belonged to another customer.
root_cause_details: The ingest_aliases array contained acme-prod, which was already associated with an existing customer.
resolution_summary: Removed the duplicate ingest alias from the new customer and linked usage to the existing customer where appropriate.
resolution_steps: Searched for an existing customer with ingest alias acme-prod.
Compared the existing customer with the new customer request.
Updated the customer creation request to avoid the duplicate alias.
verification_steps: Verify the ingest alias belongs to only one customer.
Verify the corrected customer request does not reuse the alias.
verification_results: The duplicate alias was found on an existing customer.
The corrected customer request no longer reused the alias.
